items.title: House Republicans reject Senate deal, prolonging partial government shutdown
items.dek: Airport security agents have not been paid in more than a month due to a congressional impasse, causing travel chaos across the US.
items.body: Airport security agents have not been paid in more than a month due to a congressional impasse, causing travel chaos across the US.
